metadata.title: Anara Gelado Artesanal | From the farm to the cone
metadata.description: Artisanal ice cream made with the finest natural ingredients. Bourbon Vanilla from Madagascar, pure fruit and zero artificial additives.

hero.headline: Artisanal Gelato
hero.subheadline: From the farm to the cone.

story.title: From the Farm to the Cone
story.subtitle: No artificial colours, no added flavours or preservatives.
story.p1: It all starts with seasonal and 100% fresh fruit, most of which is seasonal and some of which is organic, real milk and cream, and hand-picked ingredients like Bourbon Vanilla from Madagascar or Argentinian Dulce de Leche. No artificial additives, no colourings, no preservatives, just pure flavour with up to 75% fruit in each scoop.
story.p2: Every flavour is handcrafted in small batches at our lab in Charneca de Caparica, from fresh fruit to finished cone, because we believe the finest ingredients speak for themselves.
story.p3: This focus on quality comes from authentic techniques, learned and refined through professional gelato training with Italian expertise.

menu.title: Our Flavours
menu.subtitle: Handcrafted. Always fresh.
menu.description: We offer a diverse range of vegan and gluten-free options. These photos highlight our staple artisanal ice cream flavours. All our flavours are naturally gluten-free, apart from Oreo and a few of our Creations that contain cookies. We also have non added sugar gelato.

takeaway.title: Sustainable by Nature
takeaway.subtitle: Take away, with care.
takeaway.p1: Our takeaway boxes come in 0.5L and 1L sizes, are fully recyclable, and keep your artisanal gelato fresh all the way home. Your gelato maintains its perfect texture and consistency for up to 30 minutes on the way to your freezer at home, where you can enjoy it with your homemade crêpes, waffles or brownies.
takeaway.p2: We believe delicious handcrafted gelato and environmental responsibility go hand in hand. From sourcing local ingredients to eco-friendly packaging, every decision is made with the planet in mind.
takeaway.imageAlt: Recyclable artisanal gelato packaging by Anara

locations.title: Find Us
locations.subtitle: Come visit.
locations.eventsText: Our Italian-style gelatos and sorbets are available for weddings, private parties, and corporate events.

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.addressValue: Estrada da Bela Vista 144, 2820-166 Charneca de Caparica, Portugal
imprint.disputeText: In compliance with Law No. 144/2015, in the event of a consumer dispute, the consumer may contact the following Alternative Dispute Resolution entity:
imprint.disputeEntityValue: CNIACC – National Centre for Information and Arbitration of Consumer Conflicts
imprint.disputePortal: For more information, please visit the Consumer Portal at www.consumidor.gov.pt.
imprint.imageCreditsText: All images and videos on this website were provided by Anara Gelado Artesanal.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introText: Anara Gelado Artesanal ("we") respects your privacy. We do not track you. This policy explains how we handle data when you visit our website.
privacy.collectionText: We do not track you in any way. This website does not use analytics scripts (Google Analytics, Meta Pixel, etc.), tracking cookies, or any other tracking technologies. We do not collect, store, or process any personal data through this website.
privacy.cookiesText: This website does not use tracking cookies. The only cookie we use is to remember your language preference (Portuguese or English). This is a strictly necessary cookie that does not require consent under GDPR.
privacy.thirdPartyText: This website embeds Google Maps in the locations sections. When viewing these sections, your browser may establish a direct connection to Google's servers. For more information, please refer to Google's Privacy Policy.
privacy.contactText: If you have questions about this privacy policy, contact us at:
privacy.rightsText: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to access, rectify, or erase any personal data we may hold. Since we do not collect personal data through this website, these rights apply only to direct communications (e.g., emails you send us).

notFound.title: This scoop hit the floor!
notFound.subtitle: We searched the entire farm, but this page was nowhere to be found. Maybe it melted in the sun.

creations.title: Our Creations
creations.subtitle: Fresh. Seasonal. Unexpected.
creations.intro1: We create at least one or two special flavours each week,
creations.intro2: Our creations are born from unexpected inspirations, where classic gelato craftsmanship meets flavours from diverse culinary traditions and global influences. Find weekly specials at our Charneca da Caparica and Costa da Caparica locations.

items.morango-natas: Strawberry Fior di Latte with Strawberry Swirl
items.natas-toffee-pinhoes: Fior di Latte with Toffee and Caramelised Pine Nuts
